tagline: Where island life meets untouched nature

intro.label: About Calatrava
intro.title: A hidden gem on the northern tip of Tablas Island
intro.body: Nestled on the northernmost coast of Tablas — the largest island in Romblon — Calatrava is a municipality of unspoiled beaches, dramatic waterfalls, and warm island hospitality. Budget-friendly and uncrowded, it offers what few destinations still can: genuine island life.
